mapper.select: SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = i.facility_num

SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = i.facility_num
AND upper(i.type) = 'EQUIP'
AND upper(i.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(i.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND (upper(i.type) = 'RAW' OR upper(i.type) = 'MATERIAL')
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
